commands.review_summary:
The PR teaches `stageSandboxMedia` to resolve managed `media://inbound/*` references into runner-readable staged files and adds sandbox and host-mode regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +43, Tests +64. Total +107 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main renders managed inbound documents as `media://inbound` prompt refs and only inlines images for current-turn attachments. I did not rerun the live Telegram reproduction, but the PR body includes before-baseline Crabbox proof.
